title: GEMglCopyTexImage1D
description: copy pixels into a 1D texture image

messages.description: Specifies the level-of-detail number. Level 0 is the base image level. Level n is the nth mipmap reduction image.
Specifies the internal format of the texture image.
Specifies the xoffset parameter, the lower left corner of the texture image is (xoffset, 0).
Specifies the width of the texture image.
Specifies the border of the texture. Must be 0.

arguments.description: Specifies the level-of-detail number. Level 0 is the base image level. Level n is the nth mipmap reduction image.
Specifies the internal format of the texture image.
Specifies the xoffset parameter, the lower left corner of the texture image is (xoffset, 0).
Specifies the width of the texture image.
Specifies the border of the texture. Must be 0.
